subcodes.first_line: O Sakínih! Thou hast hearkened unto the Voice of the Wronged One in times past and present, and hast quaffed from the choice wine of utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا سکینه ندای مظلوم را از قبل و بعد شنیدی و از رحیق بیان آشامیدی حق لازال
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @call to action
